insecure-auth.ts.message: JWT secret is hardcoded as a string literal. Move to environment variable.
Password stored in plain text without hashing. Use bcrypt.

sql-injection.ts.message: SQL query built via string concatenation with user input. Use parameterized queries.
sql-injection.ts.suggestedFix: const result = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [userId]);

flask-sql-injection.py.message: SQL query built with f-string using request.args. Use parameterized queries.

java-sql-injection.java.message: SQL query built via string concatenation. Use PreparedStatement with parameters.
java-sql-injection.java.suggestedFix:
PreparedStatement stmt = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?");
stmt.setString(1, userId);

go-unchecked-error.go.message: SQL query built with fmt.Sprintf. Use parameterized queries.
go-unchecked-error.go.suggestedFix: rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", userId)
